scope: zero-optimizer-step pre-clipping gradient geometry of the trained C2 coordinate objective across five modality regimes

evaluation.checkpoint_state: raw training model at step 2111, not EMA

decision_rule.no_conflict: retain global clipping; norm differences alone do not authorize an optimizer change
decision_rule.persistent_conflict_and_severe_clipping: prepare exactly one separately frozen comparison among blockwise clipping, adaptive gradient clipping, or target-RMS normalization
decision_rule.boundary: Do not change clip norm or stack optimization modifications in this audit. No training, E1/L1/M1/J2, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT is authorized.
